evidence.page_title: Oscars 'seal clap' was to protect rings, says Nicole Kidman – video
evidence.title: Oscars 'seal clap' was to protect rings, says Nicole Kidman – video
evidence.description: Actor Nicole Kidman tells Australian radio station KIIS FM on Thursday that her unusual style of ‘seal clapping’ at the Oscars was to protect her diamond rings
evidence.text:
Oscars 'seal clap' was to protect rings, says Nicole Kidman – video
This article is more than 9 years old
Actor Nicole Kidman tells Australian radio station KIIS FM on Thursday that her unusual style of ‘seal clapping’ at the Oscars was to protect her diamond rings. The way Kidman applauded when an award was introduced on stage went viral on social media, prompting comparisons with a seal

evidence.page_title: Nicole Kidman explains unusual clapping at Oscars to Ellen ...
evidence.title: Nicole Kidman explains unusual clapping at Oscars to Ellen DeGeneres
evidence.description: Australian actress Nicole Kidman has gone on the record to explain her reasons for clapping with splayed fi...
evidence.text:
Australian actress Nicole Kidman has gone on the record to explain her reasons for clapping with splayed fingers at the Oscars earlier this year.
During an appearance on The Ellen DeGeneres Show, Kidman – whose applause went viral, drawing comparisons to that of a seal – joked that the image had been distorted by the camera lens.
“I do not clap like that, that is a weird lens,” she said, while DeGeneres played a clip of the infamous clap for the audience.
Kidman then went on to explain she was spreading her fingers to avoid damaging an expensive ring she was wearing.
“Because, it’s the Cinderella thing, you borrow these expensive jewels and I’m like, ‘You must not damage these diamonds!’” she said.
“And they went back beautifully intact, not a scratch on them.”
Back in March Kidman described to KIIS FM’s Kyle and Jackie O her awkward position of wanting to clap but feeling unable to out of fear.
Kidman’s 13.58-carat diamond ring was part of a 119 carat Harry Winston diamond set lent to her during her attendance of the Oscars.
Kidman was nominated for Actress in a Supporting Role in feature film Lion.
